EmailTemplate.description: Email to use for Facebook leads for an Admiral policy at the first attempt stage.
EmailTemplate.name: Facebook Lead (Admiral)_1st Attempt
EmailTemplate.subject: Facebook requested insurance quote
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Lead.FirstName},
Thanks for providing your details via our Facebook form.
I haven’t yet been able to speak with you to provide your business insurance quote over the phone. Is there a good time for me to try you again?
Here at Kingsbridge we offer a complete package of cover that is designed specifically for UK businesses. Our comprehensive package includes Public Liability, Goods and Tools cover, and Employers’ Liability (if required).
We can also include optional benefits such as:
- Hired in Plant cover - Covers you in the instance that plant equipment was damaged or stolen. - Own Plant cover - Covers you in the instance that plant equipment was damaged or stolen. Contract Works - Covers you against accidental loss, destruction or damage for materials and labour that you've used caused by an unforeseen event in order to restore the project to its status prior to occurrence. - Professional Indemnity - Covers you against the cost of compensating a client for loss caused by negligent services or advice
So, I can discuss with you which parts of the policy would be relevant for your business, it would be great to speak over the phone. When would be a good time for me to reach you?
Alternatively, you can contact me on 01242 808 740. Our office is open between the hours of 8:00am-5:30pm, Monday-Friday.
I look forward to hearing from you.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Sales Team
E: salesteam@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808740
